subcategory: AI-powered hero with animated 3D wave background and prompt input
use_cases: AI-powered SaaS landing pages for code generation platforms
Developer tool landing pages with interactive hero sections
Prototyping tool homepages with prompt-based input
ai_summary: A dynamic hero component featuring an animated 3D wave background rendered with Three.js, post-processing bloom effects, and a typing placeholder animation. Includes integrated AI prompt input with a submit button, designed for SaaS platforms and developer tools focused on AI-assisted code or app generation.
